author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone
Foundation Room Update

We’re excited to announce that the Foundation Room is now accessible in read-only mode for everyone, even if you don’t have the required role!
What is the Foundation Room?The Foundation Room is an exclusive Discord channel where community members who meet one of the requirements in ⁠✍┃fr-verify can ask questions directly to Star Atlas team members.
Now everyone can see what’s happening behind the scenes and gain insights from the team! 

 | ⁠😎┃foundation-room
